content:
# Recommendations â€” next plan iter (post iter-053)

## Headline
**B1-crux FULLY CLOSED.** `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` sorry-free â†’ `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`
sorry-free. Sorry 6â†’5, `lake build` EXIT 0, axiom-clean. The 050-052 plateau is broken. The whole B1/B2
"engine" layer is now done; only the immersion-naturality **squares** remain.

## Closest-to-completion / next frontier
- **S2 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (L900)** â€” now the single deepest blocker; S3/S4a/S4b and
  `trivialisation_restrict_compat` all transitively ride it. This is the live bottleneck. **Recommend
  `effort-breaker` on S2** (granularity: one immersion-naturality square per constituent leg of the 4-leg
  `tensorObj_restrict_iso`) BEFORE any prove round â€” it is a fresh ~150-LOC chart-chase with no precedent
  in-file, exactly the "too big to formalize in one go" shape. Give it the proof structure: naturality in
  the immersion `j` (NOT in a morphism of X-modules â€” that distinction is the whole difficulty).
- **Do NOT** send a prover at S2 raw, and **do NOT** retry `restrictFunctorComp.hom.naturality** â€” it gives
  morphism-naturality, a confirmed dead-end (auditor + prover + Knowledge Base agree). Also dead on the
  squares (Archon memory): `subst`/`rcases` on `hVU:Vâ‰¤U`, `simp[restrictIsoUnitOfLE]`, `congr 1`,
  `Iso.eq_inv_comp`, `Hom.ext`.

## Blocked / gated (plan agent should NOT assign until S2 advances)
- S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (L925) â€” dual analogue, same depth, rides S2.
- S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L950) â€” rides S2/S3.
- S4b `tensorObj_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (L966) â€” explicitly blocked on S2 + left-unitor immersion-nat.
- `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L1038) â€” telescope of all 5 squares; terminal, closes last.

## MAJOR (blueprint coverage â€” from lean-vs-blueprint-checker iter053)
- **Rewrite `lem:sheaf_pullback_unit_forget_eq` proof prose** (`Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`
  L7267-7290): steps 1-4 narrate the abandoned `comp_unit_app`-of-composite route; the realized proof uses
  forget-faithfulness + inner presheaf-pullback transpose + inverse-`leftAdjointUniq` triangle (`hAcancel`)
  + `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`, never invokes `comp_unit_app`, `hpin` dead. I added a
  `% NOTE:` flagging this. **Dispatch a blueprint-writer** to reconcile the enumerate to the realized route
  (intro paragraph + reduction-to-`hKEY` are already faithful â€” localized fix). Non-blocking (lemma is
  CLOSED), but clears coverage debt before the gate re-checks the chapter.

## MAJOR (code hygiene â€” from lean-auditor iter053, cosmetic, non-blocking)
Route to the next prover objective on `TensorObjInverse.lean` (or a cleanup pass):
- **Cross-session iter-number drift** (most confusing): `exists_tensorObj_inverse` docstring L1178-1185 uses
  iter-206/218/225/226 with "current state" phrasing (current session is iter-053). Same drift in
  `DualInverse.lean` (iter-251/260+), `SliceTransport.lean` (iter-303/260-262), `RelPicFunctor.lean`
  (iter-247). These are from a previous Archon counter; reconcile to the iter-040..053 range or strip.
- Stale "ESCALATION (per PROGRESS iter-052) / Scaffolding" comment L519-540 inside the now-complete
  `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` proof â€” reads as in-progress; the "scaffolding" `hnat`/`hpin` are executed.
- Doubly-stale iter-044 STATUS block L830 (superseded by iter-051 closure two lines down).
- MINOR: dead `with hĎ†` at L461 (`hĎ†` never referenced); drop it.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (added to PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- Forget-faithful + inner-adjunction transpose telescope to compute an opaque `ofIsRightAdjoint` sheaf unit
  (vs the proven-circular whole-composite homEquiv).
- inverse-`leftAdjointUniq` triangle (`leftAdjointUniq_inv_app` + `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`) for the
  clean unit-comparison cancellation.
- defeq `have ... := (lemma f).symm` to bridge a lemma whose `rw` MISSES under a proof-local `set Ď†`.
- `set` HAZARD: state `rfl`-haves before `set`; prefer no `set` at all over the sheafification seam.

## Coverage
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 105 `lean_aux` (flat; pre-existing debt, planner-deferred to the scheduled
  coverage/file-split phase). No NEW unmatched node this iter (no new top-level decl). Not a regression.
